headline: Lunchables Introduces Snackables, Its First-Ever Double Snack Pack Designed to Split, Swap and Share
summary: CHICAGO & PITTSBURGH, May 11, 2026--Lunchables is entering a new era of snacking. Today, the brand introduces Snackables – its first-ever double snack pack inspired by the rising demand for bite-sized, shareable foods and on-the-go formats people are craving. Designed for splitting, swapping and sharing, Snackables brings together craveable combinations of cheese, crunchy crackers and poppable favorites in convenient-dual compartment packs made for modern snack moments that both parents and kids

thumbnail.caption: Lunchables is giving friends a new way to snack together with the debut of Snackables: a new snack offering combining sweet & savory bites in a convenient double pack format, perfect for splitting, swapping and sharing.
